label: dnata network: AUH
rationale: dnata handles ground ops at AUH. DXB pilot success travels across dnata stations.

label: dnata Singapore
rationale: dnata Singapore operates at Changi. Contested market (TractEasy trials), but the dnata relationship is the door.

label: dnata at LHR
rationale: dnata runs ramp and cargo at Heathrow. A DXB reference derisks a slot-constrained, high-value station.

label: Delta ref to Unifi JFK
rationale: Delta owns ~20% of Unifi. An ATL/Delta reference unlocks Unifi's ~210 US stations, starting with the big hubs.

label: Delta ref to Unifi LAX
rationale: Same Delta-to-Unifi ownership bridge; Unifi operates at LAX.

label: Delta ref to Unifi MCO
rationale: Unifi confirmed at MCO (agent-verified 2026); high-turnover, multi-handler ramp.
